# Zoosk Customer Testimonial

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Zoosk directly integrated Sift into their fraud management system to streamline fraud processes, improve user experience, and create a safe community. Learn how Zoosk used Sift to fight fraud and improve the user experience for their members.

### See Zoosk's Story

Watch Now

![close](/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/popup-video-close.png)

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
